mapper.update: UPDATE book_stock SET stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, in_transit_quantity = #{inTransitQuantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book_stock WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId}
SELECT * FROM book_stock WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE book_stock SET available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE book_stock SET in_transit_quantity = in_transit_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE book_stock SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity - #{quantity}, in_transit_quantity = in_transit_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId} AND version = #{version} AND available_quantity >= #{quantity}

UPDATE book_stock SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND branch_id = #{branchId} AND version = #{version}
